comment.text: This is an error message that appears when a required input field is left empty.

usage.context:
<div className="ldap_attribute-mapping">
 <FieldContainer
 style={FIELD_STYLE}
 isVertical
 labelVisible
 errorMessage={t("Common:EmptyFieldError")}
 hasError={errors.firstName}
 labelText={t("Common:FirstName")}
 isRequired
 dataTestId="first_name_field_container"
 >
